temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a computer monitor displaying technical data. The screen is filled with white text on a black background. Prominently displayed is the title "RESUME SCAN ON" in blue. Below this, various lines of information are listed, including "GSM900 USER ---- 06523," "EGSM900 USER --- 00018," and "LOWER RANGE RECEIVER---- 267." Other data points like "HITS / FREQUENCY" and coordinates are also visible. The camera remains static, holding the shot on the data-filled screen. The audio opens with a low, rhythmic, and slightly tense electronic beat, creating a mood of suspense and technological surveillance. A male voice speaks in a calm, analytical tone, as if reporting data from a computer system. His delivery is steady and focused, conveying a sense of urgency and importance. "这局现在有6500多个手机电话接通了，光是山东街12个..." (This area now has more than 6,500 mobile phone calls connected. Just in Shandong Street, 12...). The scene cuts to a close-up of a man with a serious and focused expression. He is wearing a light-colored collared shirt and has large black headphones resting around his neck. He is looking down, presumably at the same computer screen, which is out of frame. The background is dark and indistinct. The same white Chinese characters from the previous shot are superimposed in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera is steady, capturing the man's concentrated demeanor. The shot changes to a medium shot of a man in a dimly lit room. He is wearing a light blue, short-sleeved shirt and is looking intently through a window with closed horizontal blinds. He raises his hand to his forehead, shielding his eyes as he peers through the slats. The white Chinese characters remain in the upper left corner. The camera is static, focusing on the man's surveillance activity.
